zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强上行趋势
zh.content:
当前SOL价格75.73，位于日内高位附近，整体运行在20日均线72.61上方，短线趋势偏多，但进入前高压力区，动能略有放缓迹象。维持强势结构

MACD维持正值0.76，显示多头动能仍在延续，但缺乏信号线数据，动能强度难以完全确认，短线可能出现震荡整理以消化涨幅。阶段性偏强

上方关键阻力位在76.33附近，若有效突破有望延伸涨势；下方支撑先看73.89，强支撑位于20日均线72.61区域。关注区间突破确认

交易策略建议以回调低吸为主，或突破76.33追多；若跌破73.89则短线转弱，应控制仓位并关注72.6支撑防守。注意风险管理

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
vs US Dollar is maintaining a short-term recovery structure after rebounding from recent lows, with price currently at 75.73 and holding a 2.45% daily gain. The market has pushed back above the 20-day simple moving average at 72.61, which now acts as a dynamic support zone. Price action shows higher lows forming within the 73–76 range, suggesting improving bullish momentum. However, resistance near recent highs continues to cap immediate upside pressure.

Momentum indicators currently lean bullish, with MACD reading at 0.76346045 indicating positive trend expansion. Although the signal line value is not provided, the histogram implication suggests ongoing upward momentum rather than reversal. The absence of RSI data limits overbought assessment, but price stability above the 20-day SMA reinforces trend strength. Overall momentum favors continuation, though confirmation from additional oscillators would improve reliability.

Immediate support is anchored at the 20-day SMA near 72.61, aligning closely with recent consolidation lows around 73. A break below this zone could expose downside levels near 70.00, followed by stronger structural support around 68.00. On the upside, resistance is established at 76.33, the recent high, with a breakout potentially opening the path toward the 78–80 region if momentum persists.

Trading bias remains cautiously bullish while price holds above the 20-day moving average, favoring long positions on dips toward support. A confirmed breakout above 76.33 would strengthen continuation signals and could justify adding exposure toward higher resistance levels. Risk management is essential, with protective stops commonly placed below 72.50 to guard against trend failure. Short-term traders should watch volume confirmation for breakout validation.
